findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc in rollup@4.22.5
findings.recommendation: Upgrade rollup to a version that resolves GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
